title: The Brew Shop Spring Wine Festival
excerpt: The Brew Shop Spring Wine Festival Special weeknight outdoor spring wine tasting! Wine Fest on a weeknight?! Why, yes! Join us for The Brew Shop's Annual Spring Wine Festival on Thursday, May 14 from 5:30 - 8:30 pm! - Walk-about tasting featuring 20 different Spring-forward wines - Outdoors and indoors! Enjoy the Spring weather with outdoor tasting stations along our front sidewalk - Featuring artisanal cheese and crackers - Discounts for retail purchases on all wines - Chat, learn and sip wine with our wonderful team of in-the-know wine distributors - A great way to stock up for Spring outings, family gatherings and patio time To give us a little more space, the tasting has been split into two sessions: 5:30-7 pm and 7-8:30 pm. Tickets are $20 per person ($15 for Wine Club Members). Please choose the time slot that works best for you! Spring Wine Festival Tickets (5:30-7 pm) Spring Wine Festival Tickets (7-8:30 pm) Must be 21 to participate. In the event of inclement weather, the event will be moved indoors. No refunds. Share Tweet Forward Thanks for your business! See you soon, Beth and Julie Copyright © 2017 All rights reserved. The Brew Shop, LLC Our mailing address is: 2004 Wilson Blvd. Arlington, VA 22201 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences or unsubscribe from this list .
